description: This repository documents the emerging discipline of context engineering and the conceptual architecture of Enterprise Context Fabric systems.

primary_concepts.name: Context Engineering
primary_concepts.definition: The discipline of designing how contextual information is gathered, structured, governed, and delivered to AI systems.

primary_concepts.name: Enterprise Context Fabric
primary_concepts.definition: An architectural pattern for connecting, assembling, and delivering contextual information from enterprise systems to AI models and agents.

primary_concepts.name: Enterprise AI Memory
primary_concepts.definition: Persistent, structured storage of contextual information that AI systems can access across sessions, tasks, and workflows.

primary_concepts.name: Time-to-Context
primary_concepts.definition: A performance metric measuring the elapsed time required to gather, assemble, and deliver contextual information needed for AI reasoning.

primary_concepts.name: Context Capsules
primary_concepts.definition: Pre-assembled, structured packages of contextual information designed for delivery to AI systems.

primary_concepts.name: Deterministic Context Assembly
primary_concepts.definition: The practice of assembling context using pre-defined, repeatable patterns rather than probabilistic retrieval methods.

primary_concepts.name: Context Ingestion
primary_concepts.definition: The process of connecting to enterprise source systems and extracting raw signals for context assembly.

primary_concepts.name: Context Assembly
primary_concepts.definition: The process of combining normalized signals from multiple enterprise systems into structured context objects.

primary_concepts.name: Context Structuring
primary_concepts.definition: The process of organizing assembled context into formats optimized for AI consumption.

primary_concepts.name: Context Delivery
primary_concepts.definition: The process of transmitting assembled context to AI models, agents, and applications.

primary_concepts.name: Enterprise Context Bottleneck
primary_concepts.definition: The gap between the contextual information an AI system needs and the information it actually receives.

implementations.name: ContextECF
implementations.description: An implementation of Enterprise Context Fabric architecture developed by Intelligent Context AI, Inc.

specifications.name: Enterprise Context Fabric Open Architecture Spec
